headline: DuPont™ MemCor™ MBR system selected for major Riverstone Water Resource Recovery Facility upgrade in Australia
summary: DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced that a MemCor™ membrane bioreactor (MBR) system has been selected as part of the next phase of upgrades at the Riverstone Water Resource Recovery Facility (WRRF) in Sydney, Australia, marking a significant wastewater infrastructure investment in support of the region's long-term population growth and environmental protection.
